cad_masters.notes: New V5 bore-envelope + tone-hole-schedule parametric master for soprano/alto/tenor/bass; mouthpiece/reed/keywork out of scope. Render check pass (openscad -o STL, exit 0).
Family body/bore dimensions (root, bore ID, wall thickness, body/bell OD, body/blank length) per variant; measurement_required provenance.
Tone-hole schedule (x_from_bell_in, hole_dia_in) per variant; drill undersize then tune.
Excel design table for family review; not measured build authority until soprano prototype corrections are folded back.
Existing Wolfram stopped-pipe first-pass acoustic model; source-only, not executed. L2 evidence.

notes: OpenSCAD source (cad/chalumeau.scad) plus the family-spec.csv/tone-hole-schedule.csv design tables are the current masters; no STEP/SolidWorks export reviewed as fabrication authority yet. Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
